phrases.icelandic: Láttu hugsanir reika, eins og ský.
phrases.transliteration: Laow-thoo hoog-san-ir ray-ka, eins og skee.

phrases.english: Embrace the journey, not just the destination.

phrases.icelandic: Ég er bara að skoða, takk.
phrases.transliteration: Yehg er BAH-rah ahth SKOH-thah, takk.

phrases.english: You are stronger than you think.
phrases.icelandic: Þú ert sterkari en þú heldur.
phrases.transliteration: Thoo ert ster-kah-ree en thoo hel-tur.

phrases.english: Hello, where is the bus stop?
Can I have the bill, please?
Where can I find a taxi?

phrases.icelandic: Halda áfram að læra, halda áfram.
phrases.transliteration: Halt-a ow-fram ath ly-ra, halt-a ow-fram.

phrases.english: Welcome, friend, nice to meet you.
phrases.icelandic: Velkomin, vinur, gaman að kynnast þér.
phrases.transliteration: Vel-ko-min, vi-nir, ga-man ath kin-nast thair.

phrases.english: Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
phrases.icelandic: Andaðu að þér ró, andaðu frá þér streitu.
phrases.transliteration: An-tha-thu ath thair roh, an-tha-thu frai thair streit-u.

phrases.icelandic: Finndu þinn miðju, vertu hér og nú.
phrases.transliteration: Finn-du thinn mith-ju, ver-tu heir oh nu.

phrases.icelandic: Friðurinn er innra með þér, alltaf.
phrases.transliteration: Frith-ur-inn eir in-ra meth thair, al-taf.

phrases.english: I'm so lucky, to know you.
phrases.icelandic: Ég er svo heppinn, að þekkja þig.
phrases.transliteration: Yeg er so hep-pin, ath thek-kya thig.

phrases.english: We are grateful, for your kindness.
phrases.icelandic: Við erum þakklát, fyrir góðmennsku þína.
phrases.transliteration: Vith er-um thahk-klah-t, fir-ir gooth-menn-sku th-eena.

phrases.english: Little by little, you'll get there.

phrases.icelandic: Hvert orð skiptir máli, æfðu þig.
phrases.transliteration: Hvert orð skipt-ir ma-li, æf-u þig.

phrases.icelandic: Vertu þolinmóður, fljótt ferðu að ná því.
phrases.transliteration: Vert-u tho-lin-mow-ður, fljótt fer-ðu að na þvi.

phrases.english: Mistakes are learning, don't fear them.
phrases.icelandic: Villur eru kennsla, óttastu þær ekki.
phrases.transliteration: Vill-ur eru kenn-sla, ott-astu þær ekki.
Hvern-ig heff-ur thu thah, ee dahg?

phrases.english: Build your future, day by day.
phrases.icelandic: Byggðu þinn framtíð, dag fyrir dag.
phrases.transliteration: Big-thoo thinn fram-tee-th, dag fir-ir dag.

phrases.english: Open your mind, expand your world.
Grow through what you go through.
phrases.icelandic: Vaxaðu í gegnum það sem þú gengur í gegn.
phrases.transliteration: Va-xa-thoo ee gy-e-grum thad sem thoo gy-en-gur ee gy-egn.

phrases.icelandic: Blómstraðu þar sem þú ert gróðursett(ur/t).
phrases.transliteration: Blohm-stra-thoo thar sem thoo ert groh-thur-set-tur/t.

phrases.english: You can do this, believe it.

phrases.icelandic: Sérhvert orð skiptir máli, ekki hafa áhyggjur.
phrases.transliteration: Sehr-hvurt orth skipt-ir mah-lee, ehk-kee hav-ah ah-hygg-yur.

phrases.icelandic: Æfðu áfram, þú ert að læra.
phrases.transliteration: Eyef-thoo ah-fram, thoo ert ath lye-rah.

phrases.icelandic: Mínar afsakanir, ég hafði rangt fyrir mér.
phrases.transliteration: Mee-nar af-sa-ka-neer, yeg haf-the rangt fur-ir mere.

phrases.english: I hope you can forgive me.
phrases.icelandic: Ég vona að þú getir fyrirgefið mér.
phrases.transliteration: Yeg vo-na ath thoo get-ir fur-geif-ith mere.

phrases.english: Play with colors, find your voice.
phrases.icelandic: Leiktu með liti, finndu þína rödd.
phrases.transliteration: LAYK-too meth LI-tee, FIN-doo THI-nah roht.

phrases.icelandic: Finndu þitt miðju, innra með þér.
phrases.transliteration: Fint-thoo thit mith-yoo, inn-ra meth thyer.

phrases.icelandic: Taktu eftir kyrrðinni, í kringum þig.
phrases.transliteration: Tak-too eft-eer keert-hee-nee, ee kring-oom theeg.

phrases.icelandic: Samþykktu það sem er, akkúrat núna.
phrases.transliteration: Sam-thyk-thoo thad sem er, ak-koo-rat noo-na.
